name: 0_.•*Builderman*•._0
description:
“I can’t move on, baby doll. Waitin’ on calls, flippin’ through stations. I’m outclassed and it’s outrageous. And I’ll take it all, baby doll, whatever’s been weighing you down.”

Helping Builderman out! Because he’s an oldie who doesn’t know how to take a break >:[

PLEAAASSEEEE I AM GATHERING THEM LIKE FLYS!!!

Anywho this was very heavily based off of Nikko’s Builderman with a few of my own headcannons, it’s wonderful, really, I mean who doesn’t love God Builderman? Will this ever actually be released or will it be left rotting only for my own enjoyment and nobody elses? Tune in next time on will I lose my mind over Roblox bots because of Roblox doing dumb shit with their platform. Also on that note, this Builderman is NOT associated with Bazuki. Never has been since everything went down, never will be after this all flies over. He is his own person now and honestly will forever stand on that hill. Bazuki never really used the account anyway besides like when he made Builderclub, that of which got taken away anyways so bleh.
creator: DyleTimeslysTrainstationBots
